scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 07 guest onboarding: JoinRequestForm segmented controls/mobile focus handling, GuestDashboard glass cards and sticky join CTA, plus GK position persistence support.

targetedTest.summary: 70 tests passed, including guest dashboard glass cards/sticky CTA and join request name input glass focus behavior plus preferred-foot and GK position segmented controls.

lint.summary: ESLint passed as part of baseline verification.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed after adding GK to the shared position domain and membership normalization.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 230 tests passed, 15 skipped.

database.command: npm run db:check; npm run verify:db:local
database.summary: Non-mock database evidence: Supabase contract check passed for 19 SQL files; local Supabase db reset applied 20260613070000_add_gk_position.sql before an unrelated QA auth seed permission error stopped the broader local API suite.

build.summary: Production build passed with build-time public Supabase env.

browserRuntime.provider: npm run dev, in-app browser, server terminal log
browserRuntime.command: npm run dev; curl -I http://127.0.0.1:3000/; in-app Browser open http://127.0.0.1:3000/
browserRuntime.summary: Runtime smoke passed: dev server reported Ready on port 3000, curl returned HTTP 200, in-app Browser loaded title FC moim with document.readyState complete and 0 console errors. After local DB reset the visible app remained on auth-loading text, but no startup/runtime error was observed.

retrospective.issuesObserved: The PRD requested a GK position segment, but the existing app domain and Supabase enum only allowed FW/MF/DF; UI-only implementation would have produced a submit-time persistence failure.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual mobile browser visual QA was not run for the sticky CTA; deterministic class tests cover BottomNav offset and CTA sizing.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider a small onboarding form fixture so future segmented-control and viewport-scroll behavior can be tested without rendering the full HomePage path.
retrospective.reason: The onboarding changes are section-specific and covered by deterministic tests; no durable harness rule promotion is needed.
